subcodes.first_line: God, exalted be His glory, hath ever loved the name Vafá, and from time immemorial His gaze hath been fixed on the Daystar of this name
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسم وفا را حق جل جلاله دوست داشته و دارد و لازال بنیر این اسم که از افق سماء
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
